content.thinking:
**Listing Open PRs**

I've initiated the process to check for open pull requests. My first step involves using the `gh` CLI to list them. I am using the command `gh pr list` to retrieve this essential data.

arguments.command: gh pr list --repo franklinbaldo/aparicio-funes --state open --json number,title,author --template '{{range .}}- [ ] #{{.number}} {{.title}} (@{{.author.login}}){{"\n"}}{{end}}'
